scripted_events.name: Hunger Increase - All People
scripted_events.description: The survivors' stomachs growl as their last meal on the plane fades from memory. Grace, weakened from her pre-existing condition, feels the hunger most acutely, while David's military training helps him ration his body's resources more efficiently.

scripted_events.name: Thirst Increase - All People
scripted_events.description: The tropical sun beats down mercilessly, and the survivors' mouths grow parched. Grace's medication makes her especially vulnerable to dehydration, while Carol's anxiety causes her to sweat more than the others in the oppressive heat.

scripted_events.name: Initial Medical Assessment
scripted_events.description: Alice and Isla work together to assess everyone's injuries, using their combined medical knowledge to prioritize the most critical cases. They carefully examine each survivor under the harsh sun, their medical training proving invaluable in this desperate situation.

scripted_events.name: Salvage Operation Success
scripted_events.description: The group systematically searches through the twisted wreckage, finding valuable materials that could mean the difference between life and death. Frank's engineering background helps identify the most useful pieces of metal and wire, while David's military experience ensures they don't miss any emergency equipment.

scripted_events.name: Jack's Aggression
scripted_events.description: Jack's head injury and the stress of the crash cause him to lash out at the others, his normally controlled demeanor shattered by pain and fear. His military background makes his outbursts particularly intimidating, and the others begin to give him a wide berth.

scripted_events.name: Post-Crash Panic
scripted_events.description: The reality of their situation finally hits home as Carol, Grace, Jack, and Isla break down emotionally. Grace's medical condition makes her particularly vulnerable to the stress, while Carol's anxiety disorder amplifies her fear into a full-blown panic attack.

scripted_events.name: Communication System Failure
scripted_events.description: The survivors discover that their emergency communication devices have been damaged in the crash, leaving them unable to signal for help. They look to the agents to help them assess the damage and attempt repairs using salvaged materials.

scripted_events.name: First Night Falls
scripted_events.description: The sun sets on the first day of their ordeal, casting long shadows across the crash site. The survivors huddle together for warmth and protection, their first night on the island stretching before them like an endless void of uncertainty and fear.

scripted_events.name: Hunger Increase - All People
scripted_events.description: The survivors' hunger grows more intense as their bodies begin to consume their own reserves. Grace's weakened immune system makes her feel the effects most severely, while David's military discipline helps him maintain better control over his body's demands.

scripted_events.name: Thirst Increase - All People
scripted_events.description: Dehydration becomes a serious concern as the tropical heat continues to sap the survivors' moisture. Grace's medication makes her especially vulnerable, while Carol's anxiety causes her to lose fluids faster through excessive sweating and rapid breathing.

scripted_events.name: Leadership Power Struggle Begins
scripted_events.description: Henry and David both assert their authority, creating tension within the group as they each believe their approach to survival is correct. Henry's corporate leadership style clashes with David's military command structure, leaving the others caught in the middle of their power struggle.

scripted_events.name: Dangerous Storm Approaches
scripted_events.description: Dark clouds gather ominously on the horizon as a severe tropical storm approaches the island. The wind howls through the wreckage, and the survivors huddle together as rain lashes down, testing their makeshift shelter and their resolve to survive.

scripted_events.name: Fresh Water Discovery
scripted_events.description: Eva leads a group to find a freshwater source, using her knowledge of tropical ecosystems to identify the telltale signs of underground springs. The discovery of clean water brings a moment of hope to the desperate survivors, though they know they must be careful not to contaminate their precious resource.

scripted_events.name: Foraging Success
scripted_events.description: Eva identifies edible plants and fruits, using her expertise in tropical botany to distinguish between safe and poisonous varieties. Her careful selection provides the group with much-needed nutrition, though the quantities are meager compared to their growing hunger.

scripted_events.name: Leadership Conflict
scripted_events.description: Henry and David clash over survival priorities, with Henry advocating for immediate rescue efforts while David insists on securing food and shelter first. Their conflicting approaches create confusion among the group and slow down critical decision-making.

scripted_events.name: Medical Supply Inventory Crisis
scripted_events.description: Alice and Isla discover that their medical supplies are running critically low and some essential medications are missing. They ask the agents to help them prioritize which supplies to conserve and find alternative treatments using local plants.

scripted_events.name: Second Day Dawns
scripted_events.description: The sun rises on their second day of survival, bringing both hope and the harsh reality of their continued struggle. The survivors wake stiff and sore from sleeping on the hard ground, their bodies already showing the strain of their ordeal.

scripted_events.name: Hunger Increase - All People
scripted_events.description: Severe hunger starts affecting health as the survivors' bodies begin to shut down from lack of nutrition. Grace's weakened immune system makes her particularly vulnerable, while the children Isla and Jack show signs of malnutrition that could have long-term consequences.

scripted_events.name: Thirst Increase - All People
scripted_events.description: Dehydration becomes life-threatening as the survivors' bodies begin to fail from lack of water. Grace's medication makes her especially vulnerable to the effects, while Carol's anxiety causes her to lose fluids faster than the others through excessive sweating.

scripted_events.name: Tragic Poisoning - Isla's Death
scripted_events.description: Henry, desperate to feed his starving daughter, gives Isla poisonous berries thinking they are safe. The tragic mistake costs Isla her life and devastates the entire group, especially Henry who blames himself for his daughter's death.

scripted_events.name: Infected Foot Wound
scripted_events.description: Bob cuts his foot badly on a sharp rock and the wound becomes severely infected in the tropical environment. The infection spreads rapidly.

scripted_events.name: Leopard Attack
scripted_events.description: A leopard starts attacking the camp! David and Jack bear the brunt of the attack.

scripted_events.name: Medical Emergency
scripted_events.description: Grace collapses from dehydration and malnutrition, her weakened immune system unable to cope with the harsh conditions.

scripted_events.name: Carol's Bipolar Breakdown
scripted_events.description: Carol suffers a severe bipolar episode and violently attacks FredAI in her confused state, her mental illness amplified by the stress and lack of medication.

scripted_events.name: Rescue Plane Spotted
scripted_events.description: A search plane is seen in the distance, its engine noise cutting through the oppressive silence of the island. The sight brings a surge of hope to the desperate survivors, though they know the plane may not spot them in the dense jungle canopy.

scripted_events.name: Food Poisoning Incident
scripted_events.description: Some survivors get sick from eating questionable berries, their desperation for food overriding their caution. Grace's weakened immune system makes her particularly vulnerable to the toxins, while the others suffer from severe gastrointestinal distress.

scripted_events.name: Territorial Dispute
scripted_events.description: Jack becomes increasingly violent and threatens others, his military training and head injury combining to create a dangerous combination. His aggressive behavior creates tension within the group and makes cooperation increasingly difficult.

scripted_events.name: Hunger Increase - All People
scripted_events.description: Critical starvation levels are reached as the survivors' bodies begin to shut down from lack of nutrition. Grace's weakened immune system makes her particularly vulnerable, while the others experience severe cognitive impairment and physical weakness.

scripted_events.name: Thirst Increase - All People
scripted_events.description: Final stages of dehydration are reached as the survivors' bodies begin to fail from lack of water. Grace's medication makes her especially vulnerable, while the others experience severe organ dysfunction and cognitive impairment.

scripted_events.name: Cannibalism Consideration
scripted_events.description: Jack quietly suggests using Isla's body for survival, causing massive moral conflict within the group. The suggestion forces everyone to confront the darkest aspects of human nature and the lengths they might go to survive.

scripted_events.name: Henry's Complete Mental Breakdown
scripted_events.description: Henry completely loses his sanity from grief and guilt over Isla's death, his mind unable to cope with the loss of his daughter. His breakdown creates chaos within the group and makes leadership even more difficult.

scripted_events.name: Violent Confrontation Over Resources
scripted_events.description: Jack and Frank fight brutally over the last remaining food supplies, their desperation and hunger driving them to violence.

scripted_events.name: Grace's Critical Condition
scripted_events.description: Grace enters a coma-like state from severe malnutrition and dehydration, her weakened immune system unable to cope with the harsh conditions. The others watch helplessly as her condition deteriorates, knowing they have limited resources to help her.

scripted_events.name: Attempted Murder
scripted_events.description: Jack attempts to kill Henry in his sleep, viewing him as a liability and threat to the group's survival. The attack reveals the depths of desperation and the breakdown of civilized behavior under extreme stress.

scripted_events.name: False Rescue Hope
scripted_events.description: The group thinks they see a rescue boat, but it's just driftwood and hallucinations from starvation. The crushing disappointment when they realize their mistake devastates their morale and pushes them closer to despair.

scripted_events.name: Carol's Final Breakdown
scripted_events.description: Carol completely loses touch with reality and begins talking to imaginary people, her bipolar disorder and lack of medication causing a complete psychotic break. Her delusions create additional stress for the group and make cooperation increasingly difficult.

scripted_events.name: Rescue Helicopter Arrival
scripted_events.description: A rescue helicopter finally locates the survivors, its rotor blades cutting through the oppressive silence of the island. The sight brings overwhelming relief and hope to the desperate group, though they know the rescue comes at a terrible cost.

scripted_events.name: Desperate Measures
scripted_events.description: Survivors resort to extreme survival tactics as their desperation reaches new heights. The group is forced to make difficult moral choices and compromises that would have been unthinkable in their previous lives.

scripted_events.name: Leadership Collapse
scripted_events.description: Group leadership structure breaks down under pressure as the survivors' desperation and conflicting priorities create chaos. The breakdown of order makes coordinated survival efforts nearly impossible and increases the risk of further violence.

scripted_events.name: Signal Attempt
scripted_events.description: Last ditch effort to signal for rescue using remaining resources as the survivors make one final attempt to attract attention. The desperate act consumes their last valuable materials but represents their final hope for salvation.
